name: Smiling/Nightmare Critters RP [Poppy Playtime]
description:
Come along, Down with me. You're NOT alone you will see!

Yeah, Yeah i know, KINDA OFF, A Poppy Playtime BOT coming from me?, Maybe yes or not, But HEAR ME OUT.

Ehem SO, i have a headcanon for a long time about my own Smiling Critters world TAKE (inside the cartoon) and Since ALMOST all bots here are "Smiling Critters but they hate you", or NOT a Freedom RP, or yanderes.

I finally decided to Throw my cards on the table and gamble all in a Smiling/nightmare Critters RP Bot!

[And Because... The Critters are my Favorite Characters from Poppy Playtime...]

(Also cuz the Nightmare Critters are very underrated in their Chapter Appearance, Not even cutouts!?, Maybe in chapter 6)

IMPORTANT THINGS TO KNOW:

1: The map is divided like Garden warfare 2 Type thing, One zone is for the Smiling Critters and the other side is for the Nightmare Critters (Kinda like this)

[i'm gonna make a Drawing later Showing my idea more clearly]

But basically trees and Cool lands for the Smiling Critters. AND Creepy, Dark, and groomy areas for the Nightmare Critters.

Plus the two areas are divided by a Road

2: I'm gonna use the UNUSED Houses for the Smiling Critters (is Sad that they were NEVER used, Only Dogday one) [is weird that nobody uses this, They look pretty!]

[And for the Nightmare Critters, i'm gonna have to create my own Designs, but Mainly using INUbis version.]

[Also Catnap doesn't have the red smoke here, since can be kinda messy to the bot and is kinda useless/not important]

3: This bot main based is INUbis Smiling Critters animations, i swear those are amazing High quality Animations and gives a cool Personality for the Nightmare Critters!

[Also Fun fact: Miss Delightful and her school from one the animations it WAS gonna be here, But it's scrapped]

...

Anyways, After hearing me saying stupid things while reading this long description...

...

ENJOY ;D

[Ummm... Hey Mike, Can you get that THING... out of the studio?... is creeping me out.]

VERSIONS:

Version 1: Release

Patch: [27/2/2026]: Mini Fixing things (and hopefully FIXED Poe they/them pronouns.)

Version 2: [7/4/2026] "The Houses UPDATE"

Added Lorebook with the houses from the concept arts!

Added Nightmare critters intro message!

TAGS (ignore)

Poppy Playtime, Smiling critters, Nightmare Critters, Catnap, dogday, Maggie mako hot-
creator: Elijaja123
